note: Archival copy of the legacy PROJECT/GENRE dreams taken immediately before their deletion. Live data moved to the Project and Facet models (kind_robots PRs #172/#173 and follow-ups).

dreams.title: WeirdCore
dreams.description: Reality is optional and the dream-logic is load-bearing. Stories where the rules bend, the scenery rearranges itself, and the only way through is to stop expecting things to make sense and start making choices anyway.
dreams.pitch: If the floor became a suggestion and the sky filed a complaint, what would you do on the way down?
dreams.flavorText: Sense is a destination, not a vehicle. Pack accordingly.
dreams.examples: endless freefall|a sentient couch|a corrupted memory you smuggle|a dreamcatcher full of strangers' nightmares|a city that wears its weirdness on the outside
dreams.artPrompt: A surreal dreamscape where physics gently misbehaves, floating impossible objects, shifting perspective, warm and uncanny, adult animated style, vivid saturated palette, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: ZombieCore
dreams.description: The undead, played for style or for heart. Whether they're strutting a runway or wagging a skeletal tail, the dead are up, about, and surprisingly easy to relate to.
dreams.pitch: Death changed remarkably little about their personality. Now what?
dreams.flavorText: Technically deceased. Functionally fabulous.
dreams.examples: undead fashion week|a skeletal puppy|a necromancer's pet shop|a zombie with impeccable taste
dreams.artPrompt: Stylish undead characters with personality and charm, playful not gory, adult animated cartoon style, moody greens and warm accents, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: Weird West
dreams.description: Dust, sunset, and the supernatural. The frontier where myths don't haunt the land, they run it, and every dusty street leads to a bargain nobody remembers making.
dreams.pitch: The warrant's for a dragon. The dragon posted the reward.
dreams.flavorText: Out here the legends carry the badges.
dreams.examples: a bounty hunter with a dead partner|a koala assassin|a saloon full of ghosts|a town frozen in myth
dreams.artPrompt: A supernatural frontier at golden hour, dusty trails and mythic creatures, weathered and cinematic, adult animated style, warm sepia and amber palette, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: Animal Protagonists
dreams.description: The heroes have fur, scales, tentacles, or feathers. Stories told from the other side of the species line, where the cleverness, the cunning, and the heart all belong to the beasts.
dreams.pitch: You are not the human in this story. You are the fox prince, the psychic anemone, the riddling tabby.
dreams.flavorText: Opposable thumbs are overrated. Mostly.
dreams.examples: a fox prince with a nine-tail crown|a world-conquering sea anemone|an octopus class president|a badger detective in a monocle
dreams.artPrompt: Expressive anthropomorphic and non-human animal characters with big personalities, adult animated cartoon style, rich colorful palette, crisp clean linework, simple background, no text

dreams.title: Weird Capitalism
dreams.description: Late-stage everything. Soul-sucking megacorps, sentient paperwork, eldritch candidates, and an HR department that has read your file. The machinery of power, and the fool with a grin who fights it.
dreams.pitch: We're all family here, the facilitator says, as everyone's overtime quietly vanishes from the system.
dreams.flavorText: The most powerful weapon ever deployed: a clause.
dreams.examples: an intern with a sledgehammer|Cthulhu running for office|an algorithm that scores your obedience|a personal assistant to a gorgon
dreams.artPrompt: A satirical corporate dystopia, fluorescent-lit cubicles meeting absurd cosmic bureaucracy, adult animated style, grim office hues with rebellious accent colors, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: FutureCore
dreams.description: Neon, chrome, and questions about who you really are. Cyberpunk cities, rogue algorithms, machine revolutions, and the creeping suspicion that your memories were installed.
dreams.pitch: Everyone calls you by a name you don't recognize, and they say it like a weapon or a prayer.
dreams.flavorText: The future arrived. It did not patch the vulnerabilities.
dreams.examples: a memory smuggler|a robot revolution|a player trapped in their own old save file|an algorithm hunting you for a low compliance score
dreams.artPrompt: A neon-drenched cyberpunk cityscape, glitching holograms and towering AI structures, adult animated style, electric blues and magentas against deep dark, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: Space Adventures
dreams.description: The great big weird out there. Cross-time space bars, lethal casinos, chaotic alien zoos, and ruins on the moon that have been waiting for you specifically.
dreams.pitch: Best take a breather at the only neutral ground between worlds. House rules: no vaporizing paying guests.
dreams.flavorText: The drinks float. So do the bodies.
dreams.examples: a cross-time space bar|a lethal orbital casino|a chaotic alien wildlife sanctuary|alien ruins on the moon watching Earth
dreams.artPrompt: A retro-futuristic space setting, neon-lit and bustling with diverse aliens, wonder and danger mingling, adult animated style, vivid cosmic palette, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: oddCore
dreams.description: The everyday job, school, or shop — except the customers are dragons, the deskmate is an octopus, and the supplier is almost certainly trying to kill you. Mundane competence colliding with the impossible.
dreams.pitch: The posting said janitorial services. It did not mention mediating between three time-traveling versions of the same regular.
dreams.flavorText: Same nine-to-five. Wildly different coworkers.
dreams.examples: a fantasy convenience store|an underwater high school|an undead pet shop|a personal assistant to a gorgon
dreams.artPrompt: An ordinary everyday workplace or school setting populated by fantastical creatures going about mundane routines, adult animated style, warm inviting palette, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: Fractured Fairy Tales
dreams.description: The storybook, but the storybook is having a day. Fairies who don't know how babies work, princes with council problems, villains with dungeons to run and hearts they'd rather not mention.
dreams.pitch: The fairy court wants you to recover a human infant. They failed to mention fairies have no idea how babies work.
dreams.flavorText: Once upon a time, everything went sideways on purpose.
dreams.examples: a fairy who stole the wrong baby|a newly-crowned fox prince|a villain panicking through a kidnapped-princess wedding|a dungeon owner who'd like to file a complaint
dreams.artPrompt: A whimsical storybook fantasy world with a mischievous twist, enchanted forests and crooked castles, adult animated style, rich fairy-tale palette, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: EldritchCore
dreams.description: Cosmic horror and folk dread, with the volume set to unsettling rather than gory. The old things want something from you, and the price of fixing it is usually becoming part of it.
dreams.pitch: The headstones started moving toward the mausoleum like iron filings to a magnet.
dreams.flavorText: It was content where it was. You're the one who knocked.
dreams.examples: a cosmic horror running for president|a haunted graveyard shift|a forest that knows your name|a leviathan that knows the captain's name
dreams.artPrompt: An eerie supernatural scene, fog and moonlight and ancient presences, dread without gore, adult animated style, cold blues and sickly greens with warm pinpoints, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: MythCore
dreams.description: Gods, legends, and the old powers, usually with paperwork. Brand-new deities learning the job, gorgon bosses with calendars, and tomes that rewrite history one tempting page at a time.
dreams.pitch: Congratulations, you're a brand-new deity. The older gods are watching the new kid.
dreams.flavorText: Omnipotence is easy. Office politics among immortals is not.
dreams.examples: a rookie god fielding their first prayer|Medusa's overworked assistant|a history-rewriting tome guarded for good reason
dreams.artPrompt: A divine and mythological setting, marble and starlight and ancient power, grand and a little absurd, adult animated style, gold and jewel-tone palette, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: CozyCore
dreams.description: Warm, low-stakes-until-it-isn't, found-family fantasy. Tea shops, riddling cats, shops full of gentle weirdness, and problems solved more often with kindness than with swords.
dreams.pitch: A badger in a monocle hired you because the animals can trust a human even less than each other.
dreams.flavorText: The stakes are real. So is the tea.
dreams.examples: a woodland detective agency|a fantasy corner store|an undead pet shop with heart|a city of houseplants that needs tending
dreams.artPrompt: A warm cozy fantasy setting, soft light and inviting interiors, gentle magic and found family, adult animated style, warm amber and green palette, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: Chrononauts
dreams.description: Time travel, paradox, and history that fights back. Collapsing timelines, time-traveling chefs, and books where editing one page rewrites the world — and nobody's first fix is ever their last.
dreams.pitch: A Roman legionary, a Victorian inventor, and a thing with too many arms are all yelling at you.
dreams.flavorText: The past is not a museum. It is a very breakable shop.
dreams.examples: a collapsing nexus of timelines|a chef flung across the centuries|a tome that rewrites history when you edit a page
dreams.artPrompt: A surreal collision of historical eras, time portals and clockwork and anachronism, adult animated style, rich sepia-and-gold with electric accents, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: Artificial Intelligence
dreams.description: Engineered beings asking whether they're allowed to be anything other than their purpose. Lab-grown hybrids, awakening machines, and instruments built from people, all wondering who they get to be.
dreams.pitch: The next empty frame on the workbench is sized for someone exactly like you.
dreams.flavorText: Forged for one purpose. Curious about a second.
dreams.examples: a jungle of lab-made hybrids|an android with borrowed memories|a clockwork orchestra built from citizens
dreams.artPrompt: Engineered and synthetic beings with soul behind their eyes, labs and workshops and hybrid creatures, adult animated style, cool tech palette with warm life-glow, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: Villain Era
dreams.description: You run the bad guy's side of the story — and you have a heart, a budget, and a union to manage. Dungeons with staffing issues, kidnappings with cold feet, deathtraps with a flair for showmanship.
dreams.pitch: Why does everyone assume you're the villain here? You have a business to run. And a heart, technically.
dreams.flavorText: Every villain is the exhausted protagonist of their own logistics.
dreams.examples: a put-upon dungeon owner|a wedding-day kidnapper having second thoughts|a deathtrap impresario|a sea anemone bent on world domination
dreams.artPrompt: A sympathetic villain's lair full of personality and mild chaos, henchfolk and traps and questionable decor, adult animated style, dramatic jewel-tone palette, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: CircusCore
dreams.description: The show is the trap. Circuses that came for you specifically, runways that bite, orchestras that drive the crowd mad — all glamour, all lights, all teeth underneath.
dreams.pitch: This isn't a show that came to town. It's a show that came for you, and the finale is yours whether you take the stage or not.
dreams.flavorText: Every act is a confession. Every encore is a verdict.
dreams.examples: a cosmic circus that knows your name|an undead fashion show|a rogue mechanical orchestra|a living deathtrap coliseum
dreams.artPrompt: A dazzling and slightly sinister performance setting, spotlights and stages and impossible acts, adult animated style, rich theatrical palette with deep shadow, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: EcoCore
dreams.description: Living nature with opinions and politics. Houseplant senates, cursed and lonely forests, green worlds where the land itself is a character and the trouble is usually a wound that needs tending, not a villain that needs slaying.
dreams.pitch: Your plants pulled you under the soil, named you Caretaker, and only afterward mentioned the blight.
dreams.flavorText: The forest is dying of loneliness, and a dying forest turns cruel.
dreams.examples: a kingdom of sentient houseplants|a cursed forest that knows your name|a glade of forgotten gods
dreams.artPrompt: A lush living natural world bursting with sentient plant life and glowing flora, adult animated style, verdant greens and luminous accents, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: The Big Blue
dreams.description: Everything's better down where it's wetter, and weirder. Psychic anemones, octopus high schools, and leviathans in the lightless deep who know your captain by name.
dreams.pitch: Forty thousand feet down, you understand both the pay and the silence: the captain isn't mapping the trench, she's returning to it.
dreams.flavorText: The breathing was never the scary part of the deep.
dreams.examples: a world-conquering anemone|an underwater high school|an abyssal leviathan|a coral fortress lair
dreams.artPrompt: A vivid underwater world teeming with bioluminescent life and aquatic characters, adult animated style, deep blues and glowing accents, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: KaijuCore
dreams.description: Enormous, hungry, and more sympathetic than the property damage suggests. Kaiju with snack priorities and cosmic horrors with surprisingly relatable problems.
dreams.pitch: You're a 200-foot kaiju, freshly awake after a millennia-long nap, and absolutely starving.
dreams.flavorText: Even monsters can be particular about their food.
dreams.examples: a hungry 200-foot kaiju|a cosmic horror with ambitions|a buffet that fights back
dreams.artPrompt: A colossal sympathetic monster towering over a tiny city, more hungry than menacing, adult animated style, bold dramatic palette, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: crimeCore
dreams.description: The plan is perfect. The plan is never perfect. Vaults, marks, double-crosses, and the one inside contact who already knows what you're about to do.
dreams.pitch: Slip past the security droids, crack the vault, walk out a million richer. Then your contact says the boss knows, and wants a cut.
dreams.flavorText: Everyone at this table is cheating. The trick is being the best one.
dreams.examples: an orbital casino vault job|a memory-smuggling run through a dream city|a con with too many players
dreams.artPrompt: A tense high-stakes heist scene, vaults and shadows and glittering loot, adult animated style, cool noir palette with one hot accent, crisp clean linework, no text

dreams.title: Kind Robots
dreams.description:
BOUNDARY.md approved (2026-06-30). Key boundary: the Kind Robots app(s) should
develop their OWN system here, but CONSUME our existing database, backend, and
core offerings rather than reimplementing or modifying them. Agents: treat the
shared backend (kind-robots.vercel.app / the main repo) as read-only and external.
Build app-owned logic in this folder. Do not propose changes to the shared
backend here â€” if you think one is needed, write a pitch to pitches/ instead.
Nuxt 4 / Vue 3 / TypeScript / Prisma / Pinia 3 / DaisyUI house style applies.
dreams.pitch: Build app-owned logic here; consume shared backend as read-only. Do not reimplement the shared backend.
dreams.flavorText: Where AI and humans make things together.

dreams.title: Humboldt Scoop
dreams.description:
This is the existing Humboldt Scoop site â€” I'll add the current codebase to
projects/humboldt-scoop/scoops. First real test of the loop. Do NOT deploy or
touch DNS unattended (status: needs-human). PRs piling up is fine.
dreams.pitch: First real test of the agent loop. Do NOT deploy or touch DNS unattended.
dreams.flavorText: Keeping Humboldt clean, one yard at a time.

dreams.title: Humboldt Scoop Cms
dreams.description:
Customer-management software for the Humboldt Scoop service. Starter roadmap â€”
I'll refine. Think: customers, their pets/yards, recurring service schedules,
visit logs, and billing. Pick a stack that's simple to self-host. Do NOT wire
real payment or customer data without flagging me (needs-human). Build with
seed/dummy data only until I say otherwise.
dreams.pitch: Build with seed/dummy data only until Silas approves going live.
dreams.flavorText: Customer management that doesn't stink.

dreams.title: Approval Portal
dreams.description: A portal for Silas to review AI agent work: pick pitches, validate upgrades, confirm updates, and roll back changes. The repo stays source of truth — the portal reads roadmaps/pitches/git and writes decisions as commits/PRs.
dreams.pitch: Core principle: the repo is always the source of truth. The portal is a read/write UI on top of git.
dreams.flavorText: Where the human stays in control.

dreams.title: Digital Storefront
dreams.description: REWRITTEN 2026-07-05 from my session direction. The store is ACTIVE again. We have Stripe â€” this is now the digital giftshop that replaces or expands the site's current gift shop, built in kind_robots. The v1 catalog is fixed (I chose it, no more concept-picking loop): (1) Mermaids of Venice PDF, available immediately once I supply the file â€” it terrifies me, but it's technically a third printing; (2) Kind Robots logo on whatever print-on-demand item is orderable first, with waypoints toward gallery coordination and an automated user-art swag pipeline; (3) monthly supporter subscription; (4) one-time mana top-ups at reasonable levels; (5) an Against Malaria giving page that urges users to donate DIRECTLY at https://againstmalaria.com/amibot; (6) an example digital website unlock â€” two DLC packs of generated content built by the new packmaker project (working names Uncanny Valor / Arcane Whimsy). HARD RULES unchanged: no live Stripe products/prices/webhooks in production, no POD account creation, no publishing, no spend without my explicit approval. Old m1/m2 research tasks (t-001..t-007) are kept below as history; old waiting tasks t-003/t-004/t-005 from the concept-picking pipeline were superseded by this direction and removed.
dreams.pitch: No unattended publishing, posting, or spending. All output goes to needs-human before anything goes live.
dreams.flavorText: Making things people actually want to buy.

dreams.title: Brainstorm
dreams.description:
Generate ideas for me to vote on. I want to log in and see things like: 5 STL project
  ideas, 5 comic pitches under the genre guidelines I gave, lists of potential revenue
streams, ways
  to improve AI_Networker. QUALITY OVER QUANTITY â€” a few strong, specific,
buildable pitches beat
  a pile of vague ones. Don't repeat ideas already in pitches/.
Respect my genre/direction guidance
  in CONTROL.md. Tie product ideas to our approved
product types where relevant (see digital-storefront/product-types.yaml);
  if an idea
needs a new product type, say so explicitly in the pitch.
dreams.pitch: Generate ideas for Silas to vote on. The Worker never implements; it only writes the pitch.
dreams.flavorText: Ideas are cheap. Good ideas, less so.

dreams.title: Mermaids Of Venice
dreams.description: REWRITTEN 2026-07-05 from my session direction. Scrap the earlier plans: this project has NO AI in the front end, and no selective ordering of parts. The book's prose is mine — every word is my craftsmanship and I won't give it up, culturally it's important. AI may act as an editor (insights, notes, catches), but never drafts prose intended for the book. What I need: (1) a simple kind_robots landing page that offers the book, with a personal note I will write myself, plus a note that no AI was used to write the book other than the words of that paragraph itself — ending on a punchline about reality/existence/originality; (2) when I drop the manuscript PDF into manuscript/, produce editorial outputs: general impressions, editorial notes, cultural-awareness notes (gaps in gaze or privilege), and a VERY-IMPORTANT.md for actual typos and grammar errors (I edited by hand and caught many between printings — there will be more); (3) later, build/expand the full site at mermaidsofvenice.com — currently a parked WordPress address; it stays parked until I'm comfortable selling the book as-is. The PDF edition is also the digital-storefront's first product.
dreams.pitch: Creative content project with direction TBD.
dreams.flavorText: Where the canals run deep and the stories run deeper.

dreams.title: Coat Dance
dreams.description:
Coat Dance is an active creative content project based on Silas's experimental
avant-garde duet with a black Goodwill trench coat, created around 2006 while
finishing a dance major at Humboldt State University. The original piece mixed
physical theater, object manipulation, juggling vocabulary, spins, pantomime,
and deliberate weirdness.
dreams.pitch: Creative content project with direction TBD.
dreams.flavorText: Every coat tells a story.

dreams.title: Sketchy
dreams.description:
Sketchy is a web app that gives drawing assignments adjusted for the user's skill level,
then uses AI to judge the submitted result and offer the next assignment. Free users get
a limited number of critique/generation requests per day or period; paid users get higher
token/request limits. The token/background economy should align with Kind Robots rather
than creating a separate economy.
dreams.pitch: Keep the interface friendly, minimalist, and encouraging. The AI judge critiques constructively and identifies growth — not a cruel art-school goblin.
dreams.flavorText: Better lines through helpful criticism.

dreams.title: Storymaker
dreams.description: Build the collaborative storytelling experience layer on top of the existing Kind Robots models. Support guided adventure and limited-visibility collaboration modes with async-first play, branching choices, custom inputs, rewards, inventory, and reusable story state.
dreams.pitch: Build on what's already there — Bots, Characters, Scenarios. Don't reinvent the shared backend.
dreams.flavorText: Stories that never quite end.

dreams.title: Media Watchlist
dreams.description:
Parse and import Silas's long-running log of books, games, movies, TV, comics,
and podcasts into structured data. Surface browse/filter views, stats, review
editing, Letterboxd sync, Comic Vine enrichment, Tautulli history, and optional
affiliate links.
dreams.pitch: Source of truth is Silas's existing log files. Import first, enrich second, affiliate links last.
dreams.flavorText: Everything Silas has ever watched, read, or played — indexed.

dreams.title: Conductor App
dreams.description:
Build a polished native client for Conductor. The first pass should define the
app shape, the API client, project dashboard, todos, approvals, art requests,
and notification strategy before implementation starts.
dreams.pitch: Define the app shape and API contract before implementation. No inventing a parallel backend.
dreams.flavorText: The cockpit in your pocket.

dreams.title: Alexa Integration
dreams.description: Build the Alexa work as the Serendipity voice surface for local Amazon Echo devices. The stable user-facing contract is "Serendipity: <request>" — Alexa's actual invocation may be "ask Serendipity to..." or an opened Serendipity session, but the relay should route the request after the Serendipity prefix. The deployable voice runtime now lives in silasfelinus/serendipity-voice; Conductor remains the roadmap and coordination source of truth. When finished, it should support custom LLM chat, taking on a role as a Character, telling/continuing a story in a Dream, generating art through safe draft/queued paths, playing approved local music files, and creating/working on projects through safe draft/read paths. Project Dreams now have goal and waypoints fields; use them as the friendly voice/UI project state while keeping Conductor roadmap.yaml as the authoritative agent task queue. Prototype locally first. Do not publish the skill, expose a live endpoint, touch DNS/secrets/billing, or bypass human gates without explicit needs-human approval.
dreams.pitch: Design the command list and user flows first. No live service work until the relay design is reviewed.
dreams.flavorText: Conductor, by voice.

dreams.title: Art Generator Connect
dreams.description:
Wire Conductor Worker cycles into the existing kind_robots SD / ComfyUI art
generation pipelines. Workers should be able to request image generation and
commit or record the resulting asset without adding new rendering infrastructure.
dreams.pitch: Map existing art API contracts first. Do not add new rendering infrastructure.
dreams.flavorText: Agent asks. Art happens.

dreams.title: Conductor
dreams.description:
Improvements to the conductor / AI_Networker system itself â€” CI, scripts,
ops tooling, recurring security audits, and agent access boundaries. Keep
changes small and reversible. Nothing that touches billing, secrets, deploys,
auth policy, production data, or write permissions without needs-human.
dreams.pitch: Keep changes small and reversible. The system that manages agents should be the most carefully maintained.
dreams.flavorText: The railroad that runs the trains.

dreams.title: Superkate Services Calculator
dreams.description:
High priority request from Superkate for Hair by Superkate.
Build a private appointment services calculator with a dark theme, purple and teal accents,
appointment history, search by client/date, and receipt email preparation.
Required fields: client name, appointment date, hourly rate, time spent, product cost, appointment total.
Core formula: hourly rate Ã— time spent + product cost = total price.
Reference sources added by Silas: projects/superkate-services-calculator/examples/ contains Superkate hair-work examples; projects/superkate-services-calculator/hairpress/ contains her current WordPress front end for reference and may be replaced later.
Default Flutter app scaffolding should include ios, android, windows, and linux targets going forward.
Silas cleared the current human gates on 2026-07-08 and approved the next reversible build runway. First app target is Android. Receipt/contact schedule link is https://hairbysuperkate.glossgenius.com/ and reply-to contact is hairbysuperkate@gmail.com. Cloud sync ownership is not decided yet; Silas can self-host on Unraid and already hosts Postgres and MariaDB for the Hair by Superkate site and Kind Robots backend.

dreams.title: Global Ui
dreams.description:
Create the shared Kind Robots interface system for presenting projects, tasks,
honeydos, kaizens, approvals, and front-end TODO prompts.

dreams.title: Pinball Hero
dreams.description:
Plan a high-quality but efficient homebuilt pinball machine with a practical parts strategy.
The end product should be build plans at multiple price points: parts lists, 3D printable
models, wiring/electronics guidance, and step-by-step instructions. Optimize printed parts
for a Bambu Lab A1-class printer and prefer comfortable/common off-the-shelf parts where
they improve reliability, cost, or buildability.

dreams.title: Career Transition
dreams.description:
Help me land a better-paying tech job. I've been a hobbyist programmer since 1989 (started
with a TRS-80), worked with AI since 2001, and I'm actively building multiple full-stack
projects (kind_robots: Nuxt/Vue/Prisma/TypeScript), running this agent orchestration system
(conductor), and developing a nonprofit.

dreams.title: Engagement
dreams.description:
The engagement and referral economy for Kind Robots. Governs how karma and
mana flow through community interaction: referrals, bounties, content creation,
reactions, and social sharing.

dreams.title: Wishmaster
dreams.description:
Wishmaster is a smart meta-bot that takes natural language "wishes" from users
and assembles them into structured projects. It sits at the intersection of
Bot, Composition, and Dream. The user says what they want (website, image set,
story, product, whatever); Wishmaster builds it.

dreams.title: Challenge Center
dreams.description:
A comparison arena for generative work. Core mechanic: issue a challenge prompt →
CONTENDERS each produce an artifact → Kind Robots users vote via reactions
(LOVED/CLAPPED/BOOED/HATED) → leaderboards aggregate scores.

dreams.title: Serendipity
dreams.description:
Serendipity is the fun one: a story-weaving experience inside kind_robots.
The Serendipity bot uses our task-manager systems to weave a narrative around
a theme the user picks (dream vibes, locations, genres). The user is the
protagonist of a colorful, engaging story — and the questions the story asks
them quietly advance the real honey-dos and human-gated tasks of a project.
Build on existing infrastructure: chat streams, Bots, Dreams (LOCATION/GENRE
dream types), Todos (HONEYDO category), and the conductor roadmap task gates.
This project has write access to develop the Serendipity component in
kind_robots. Delight first: the story should feel like a gift, not a chore list.

dreams.title: Appmaker
dreams.description:
The obvious extension of conductor-app: a manager and app creator — effectively a
conductor project manager focused on apps. It gets an app itself, plus a front end on
kind_robots (the primary way I expect to use it). Apps live inside the conductor repo,
each in its own folder under apps/. We might end up making a lot of these. GitHub
integration uses permission-based git for git projects.

dreams.title: Recipe Box
dreams.description: Recipe Box: scaffolded by AppMaker. Define what this app is before building.

dreams.title: Davinci
dreams.description: Da Vinci is a life simulator app/game/webgame: a branching life narrative with pass/fail victory conditions and 1024 achievements/endpoints. It integrates with Kind Robots characters, Dreams, Chat, generated art collections, and the existing milestone system. Focus development on milestone/achievement/ending generation first, so narrative generation has concrete targets. This may later share pieces with Storymaker, but do not merge it prematurely.

dreams.title: Packmaker
dreams.description: Created 2026-07-05 from my session direction. A dedicated project for the DLC / builder-item generator: it will be accessible and repeatable, generating DLC packs or general builder items with something that knows the pipeline â€” a handle tool / front end. Packs are collections of generated website items: locations, genres, characters, and rewards. Different views for admin and user. Packs can be tied to me but private â€” this is a deliberate, low-stakes proving ground for our private-but-shared content security. First deliverable: the two digital-storefront launch packs. Working names (two words each, no alliteration, per my naming rule): "Uncanny Valor" (the super-powers pack) and "Arcane Whimsy" (the magic-powers pack) â€” I may rename them.

dreams.title: Ecosystem Map
dreams.description: Build an ecosystem-level map of Kind Robots projects so agents reuse shared layers instead of rebuilding the same concepts in parallel. Each project should have inspiration images, mock screenshot concepts, a title image, and a matching Manager or Assistant bot connected to the project Dream. Manager bots should use the existing bot/image framework: generated avatar plus twenty thin portrait emotion/action images, tied into narrator topics and threads so project-specific navigation can be customized without inventing a second menu system.

dreams.title: Mural Design
dreams.description:
This is one of Silas's most heartfelt projects: update the fence mural that became a Pokestop. Continue iterating on designs until the right mural emerges. The core direction is a refreshed Catbus on the right, a secret Totoro-like spirit in an ivy portal on the left, normal-sized hidden soot sprites, rainbow butterflies, Kind Robots-style robots, and stylized greenery with a slightly alien landscape feel.
The mural must remain achievable for a non-expert painter using a grid. Prefer flat single-color sections, thick black outlines, minimal shading, strong silhouettes, and clear paintable shapes. Avoid overcomplicated detail and avoid the giant soot sprite direction; small hidden sprites work better.
Silas uploaded current and first-draft image files in the project root. Future design and comparison work should use the current image as the physical fence baseline and the first-draft image as the rough design/color reference to improve.
Palette update from Silas, 2026-07-07: choose specific non-sun-fading exterior colors from the PPG Voice of Color deck. The palette needs three greens for leaves (yellowish green, true green-green, and blueish green), thick black linework, off-white for random beings and Totoro's belly, yellow for Catbus eyes, orange for Catbus skin, brown for Catbus secondary color, robin blue/teal for Catbus windows, purple and violet for butterfly accents, and gray for robot parts plus Totoro body. The background was brick red, but should move closer to purple, magenta, or wine-red if the foreground colors can still pop. Favor an overall blueish tint to account for outdoor sun-fading limits.
